data.body: GAP_FINDING: Exact literal strings required in single-agent-integrate.md to pass 1489-4b1d structural tests: (1) step heading pattern, (2) 'dso harvest-worktree' or 'harvest-worktree' (NOT 'harvest-worktree.sh' — use shim form), (3) 'REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md', (4) '[ "$WORKTREE_PATH" =' (bash guard), (5) 'cd $WORKTREE_PATH &&', (6) 'CONTEXT ANCHOR' (exact case), (7) 'ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT', (8) 'WORKTREE_ARTIFACTS', (9) pattern showing WORKTREE_ARTIFACTS computed inside WORKTREE_PATH context. Finding 4: Before implementing, read plugins/dso/docs/contracts/harvest-attestation-format.md and check harvest-worktree.sh argument signature. record-review.sh and record-test-status.sh MUST run from inside WORKTREE_PATH (cd $WORKTREE_PATH &&) so their outputs land in WORKTREE_ARTIFACTS — if they run from ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT the harvest attestation will fail.
